displayName: Thai-English Pronunciation Path - Grade 5 Classroom Version

lessonUnits.studentGoal: Make English TH clearly in words like think, this, and thank you.
lessonUnits.unlockRule: Default path can unlock after the previous unit. Teacher-assignable and challenge items require teacher approval.
lessonUnits.masteryRule: Ready: 75+ on starter items. Strong: 80+ average on two different practice days.
lessonUnits.teacherNote: Use defaultEntryIds for student autopilot. Use teacherAssignableEntryIds for whole-class or small-group targeted practice.
